title: Rule-RuleSet-Branch
description: JSON schema for a Pega rule branch. This is an infrastructure rule type.

pyBranchID.description: The branch identifier (unique across the application). Must be 3-16 characters and must not start with 'px', 'py', or 'pz'.

pyLabel.description: Display label shown in Dev Studio and App Studio. Defaults to pyBranchID if not provided.

pyBaseRule.description: 'true' for some branch records. Observed as 'false' on all 70 validated server records.

pyRuleName.description: Lowercase branch name. Set by the platform on save.

pyRuleSet.description: Branch ruleset name. Matches pyBranchID (the lowercase branch name) in all observed server records.
